creator: pat@patmaddox.com
text:
Interesting, according to the changelog [1] it's at 2.4.0 - but there hasn't been a release or tag for that version.

Anyway, I've been using 2.3.2 daily for a little over a month [2] with no issues.

[1] https://github.com/elixir-editors/emacs-elixir/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md
[2] https://patmaddox.com/file?name=ports/lang/elixir-mode.el/Makefile&ci=3ca4beb4f1c86d8e
